title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Rackspace India

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Rackspace India
jsonLd.description:
Rackspace India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Software Engineer for our Jabalpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Rackspace India:
Rackspace India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rackspace India!
